holdings.infoBox: IWF is an equity ETF with a total of 389 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 13.29%, Apple at 11.90%, Microsoft at 7.92%, Broadcom at 5.33%, and Amazon.com at 4.66%.

overview.description: The iShares Russell 1000 Growth ETF (IWF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 Growth index. The fund tracks an index of US large- and mid-cap stocks selected from the Russell 1000 Index with the highest growth characteristics, based on Russell's style methodology. IWF was launched on May 22, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
